paths.name: @/domain
paths.message: Import repositories from '@/lib/repositories', not the domain factory. Only src/lib/repositories.ts may import '@/domain'.

paths.name: @/domain/index
paths.message: Import repositories from '@/lib/repositories', not the domain factory. Only src/lib/repositories.ts may import '@/domain'.

patterns.message: Do not import a concrete mock repository. Import 'repositories' from '@/lib/repositories' instead.
Do not import a concrete repository implementation. Import 'repositories' from '@/lib/repositories' instead. (Repository TYPES are re-exported from each domain's index for typing only.)
UI code must not import @tennis/mock-data directly. Go through a domain repository via '@/lib/repositories'. Only domain repository implementations (src/domain/**) may read mock data.
lib/repositories*.ts must go through the @/domain factory (and its re-exported types), not concrete repos, the http-client, or mock data.
